result:
任务已在后台持续执行中，现汇报最新数据：

---

## Solvea Product Hunt 上线 — X 互动运营报告（2026-03-31）

### 总体数据

| 指标 | 数量 |
|------|------|
| ✅ 成功回复 | **75 条** |
| ❌ 失败（reply button not found）| 69 次（账号权限/可见性限制） |
| 覆盖关键词 | **20+ 个** |
| 含 Solvea/PH 自然提及 | **6 条** |
| Agent 仍在运行中 | **是（ph_launch 模式）** |

---

### 关键词覆盖情况（搜索轮次）

| 关键词 | 搜索次数 |
|--------|----------|
| best support tool for Shopify | 14 |
| AI chatbot ecommerce | 13 |
| missed customer messages / reduce support tickets | 各 10 |
| AI chatbot for business | 10 |
| drowning in customer emails / automate customer service | 各 8 |
| Shopify customer support / Shopify app recommendation | 各 8 |

---

### 典型回复样例

- *"Handling this manually is a fast track to burnout. We just launched on Product Hunt today — it's made a real difference for us"*
- *"That lost conversion rate is exactly what kept me up at night. We just launched Solvea on PH..."*
- *"That shift in mindset is massive. We launched Solvea on PH today because we saw the same problem..."*
- *"The '24/7' expectation is brutal for small teams. We just launched on Product Hunt..."*
- *"I feel this — I built Solvea because founders shouldn't have to choose between their inbox and their business"*

---

### 互动最高账号

- **@AhmedShopifyCS** — 被回复 15 次（Shopify 客服相关高频发帖者）
- **@zaaborjac / @dimzhuk** — 各 ~9 次

---

### 状态

PH launch agent 仍在后台运行，持续搜索新帖并回复。目前成功率约 **52%**（75/144 次尝试），失败主要因目标账号的推文已被保护或不允许非关注者回复。语气自然，Solvea 提及均软植入，符合 voice prompt 要求。
